    private SafetyValve
    InletSeparatorSafetySystemExample.reliefValve
    Pressure Safety Valve (PSV-1001) protecting V-100.
    Methods in neqsim.process.examples that return SafetyValve
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    SafetyValve
    InletSeparatorSafetySystemExample.configurePressureSafetyValve()
    Configures PSV-1001 and sizes it against two relieving scenarios: Blocked gas outlet — full feed gas mass flow vented through the PSV (gas service, 10% overpressure per API 520). External fire — reduced rate fire-case vapour generation (fire service, 21% overpressure).
    SafetyValve
    InletSeparatorSafetySystemExample.getReliefValve()
